title: oncidium velleum
intro: Oncidium velleum, also known as the Yellow Velleum Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oncidium velleum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
